subcodes.first_line: And unto God belongeth the inheritance of the heavens and the earth. O Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Ṣádiq and steadfast leaf, Fá'izih, upon them both [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و لله میراث السموات و الارض جناب آقا سید صادق و ورقه موقنه فائزه علیهما
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
